$comment: Manual one-off events for LBI — dated events spotted on venue websites that don't appear on any scrapeable calendar. Add new entries as you find them. start/end times are wall-clock in America/New_York.

events.title: Full Moon Party
events.description: Annual 'Scandalous Extravaganza' — when the moon is bigger so are our drinks. Band on the beach, DJ inside the club. Look for the spotlights in the sky to guide you in!
events.address: 10 South Atlantic Ave, Beach Haven, NJ 08008

events.title: White Out Party
events.description: Annual White Out Party — wear white clothes and accessories! Band on the beach stage.
events.address: 10 South Atlantic Ave, Beach Haven, NJ 08008

events.title: Striped Bass Derby (Day 1)
events.description: 28th annual Striped Bass Fishing Derby — three-day tournament drawing anglers from up and down the East Coast in search of the elusive 'big one'. Has raised more than $800,000 to date for local organizations.
events.address: 10 South Atlantic Ave, Beach Haven, NJ 08008

events.title: Striped Bass Derby (Day 2)
events.description: Day 2 of the 28th annual Striped Bass Fishing Derby. See Day 1 for tournament details.
events.address: 10 South Atlantic Ave, Beach Haven, NJ 08008

events.title: Striped Bass Derby (Day 3)
events.description: Day 3 of the 28th annual Striped Bass Fishing Derby. See Day 1 for tournament details.
events.address: 10 South Atlantic Ave, Beach Haven, NJ 08008
